zh.lifeSummary: Ralph Marsham是Lord Mayor John Marsham和Elizabeth Claxton的兒子，出生。他於1541年5月29日與Elizabeth Blackman在英國英格蘭諾福爾可曼可洛福特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1579年在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ralph Marsham是Lord Mayor John Marsham和Elizabeth Claxton的儿子，出生。他于1541年5月29日与Elizabeth Blackman在英国英格兰諾福爾可曼可洛福特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1579年在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Ralph Marsham was born as the son of Lord Mayor John Marsham and Elizabeth Claxton. He married Elizabeth Blackman on 29 May 1541, in Mancroft, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1579, in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Ralph Marsham est né, fils de Lord Mayor John Marsham et Elizabeth Claxton. Il a épousé Elizabeth Blackman le 29 mai 1541, à Mancroft, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1579, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Ralph Marsham è nato il come figlio di Lord Mayor John Marsham e Elizabeth Claxton. Lui sposato Elizabeth Blackman il 29 maggio 1541, nel Mancroft, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1579, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph MarshamはLord Mayor John MarshamとElizabeth Claxtonの息子として生まれた。1541年5月29日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクマンクロフトでElizabeth Blackmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1579年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで死去した。

ko.St Peter Mancroft, Norwich, Norfolk, Eng: 영국 노르폴크 노위치 스트 피터 먼크로프트
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Marsham(은)는 Lord Mayor John Marsham(와)과 Elizabeth Claxton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1541년 5월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 먼크로프트에서 Elizabeth Blackman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1579년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ralph Marsham nasceu filho de Lord Mayor John Marsham e Elizabeth Claxton. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Blackman em 29 de maio de 1541, em Mancroft, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1579, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.St Peter Mancroft, Norwich, Norfolk, Eng: ст питир манкрофт, норвич, норфолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Ralph Marsham родился. Его родителей звали Lord Mayor John Marsham и Elizabeth Claxton. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Blackman 29 мая 1541 г. в местности манкрофт, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1579 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.
